original_image_tags: Standard Form 64. The document has three hole punches at the top. The right margin contains a distribution list with checkmarks next to "Mr. Tolson" and "Mr. E. A. Tamm". The name "Miss Gandy" is visible at the bottom of this list.

elements.description: Page contains a typed office memorandum regarding 'FLYING DISCS' dated August 8, 1947, with handwritten initials, numbers, and various stamped labels (e.g., 'G. I. R. 9', 'RECORDED & INDEXED'). There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

judge.reason: Description A claims specific visual elements (hole punches, a distribution list with checkmarks, and the name 'Miss Gandy' in a list) that are not mentioned in Description B, which instead describes handwritten initials, numbers, and stamped labels as the only visual content.
